title: The Pawnbroker
writer: Morton S. Fine, David Friedkin, Edward Lewis Wallant
actors: Rod Steiger, Geraldine Fitzgerald, Brock Peters
plot: A Jewish pawnbroker, victim of Nazi persecution, loses all faith in his fellow man until he realizes too late the tragedy of his actions.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 6 wins & 10 nominations total
